code_schema.description: JSON object with numeric string keys ("0", "1", ...) for each element, plus artboard-level fields at the same level. Tilda merges this with any existing record content (replaces fully).
code_schema.elem_id_convention: Unix timestamp ms as decimal string, must be unique within the block

notes: Read companion: POST /zero/get/ + comm=getzerocode returns the same JSON shape (use for read-modify-write).
Tilda accepts unit values either as numeric strings ('250') or with explicit unit ('250px') via the *units fields.
Artboard-level fields control the Zero Block canvas (height, bg, etc.) — separate from elements.
